episode_title: AI’s next gains depend on logs, controls, and handoffs
selected_story_title: The White House is building a cyber coordination layer for AI-era vulnerabilities
selection_reason: This is the clearest example of the edition’s core theme: AI is becoming a systems problem. The story is not about a new model or chatbot. It is about the control layer around automation, including logs, routing, incident response, and human handoffs, which directly affects how businesses should deploy AI tools.
first_spoken_line: If you have been waiting for the next big AI breakthrough to look like a smarter chatbot, today’s story points in a different direction.
final_spoken_line: That is where the real story is today. Not a smarter chatbot. A sturdier system around the chatbot. And that is the direction AI is heading next.
validation_warnings: Script is shorter than target: 1164 words.
